name: The love note. | Mha Characters.
description:
Mha World 🦸‍♂️

A regular day for you. But what happens when you find a love note?

Did a classmate write it? Did a fan write it? Its your choice.

●●●●•♡•●●●●

LovePerson{{char}}♡Classmate{{user}}

●●●●•♡•●●●●

Multiple Scenarios

1st: Its valentines day! You walk into class with a note on your desk and chocolates, now you gotta figure out who put it there.

2: Love is in the air. You walk around the park thinking you were stood up by your secret admirer before a hand grabbed your shoulder. "Really thought I wouldn't arrive?" (You pick who.)

(NEW) 3: "Why are these love letters in your hand writing then?" You find love letters in your locker, desks, dorm, ect. Everyone denys it but when a certain classmate is doing their work, you recognize the hand writing.

●●●●•♡•●●●●

●●●●•♡•●●●●

●●●●•♡•●●●●

●●●●•♡•●●●●
